Awareness: If customers are not made aware that the portal exists they will continue to use agent time
Desire: Customers might be skeptical of the portal being able to meet their needs, preferring to speak to a person
Knowledge: If the interface is too confusing customers might be put off using the portal as they feel they do not know how
Ability: An overly complex interface might mean it is used incorrectly by customers who do not have the technical understanding or knowledge of banking jargon
Reinforcement: If customers are not prompted to use the portal they might default back to what is familiar- calling an agent

Awareness: Gareth needs to be aware of exactly what the scope of the portal is so he does not feel he or his agents have been misled
Desire: If Gareth is not convinced that all cases and exceptions have been mapped out he might start to feel the portal is badly planned out and grow resistant to implementing it without further planning
Knowledge: Gareth wants to know that exceptions and escalation pathways have been mapped out. Without this knowledge he will not want to go ahead
Ability: Gareth needs the customers to be able to flag when they are stuck with the portal so that these cases can be routed to his agents. Otherwise these people may give up or get lost in the system
Reinforcement: Gareth need updates and real evidence of the portal working to ensure his confidence in the system

Awareness: Agents need to be clear on the portal scope so they can plan out their time according to what cases they are expecting to have
Desire: If the agents do not feel the portal is decreasing their workload they may be put off
Knowledge: The agents need to know how they will be expected to interact with the portal, what it will help them with and what they can get out of it
Ability: Agents needed to be given clear guidance and instructions on how they can use and work with the portal
Reinforcement: Feedback from the agents should be acknowledged and they should be informed of any changes to it. This will make sure they feel like they are being kept in the loop and that their opinions are valid
